title: imagebuildah: stages shouldn't count as their base images
body:
This is my first cherry-pick into a branch like this, so a good eyeball would be appreciated.
Picked from: #2321 and also #2306

When initializing a build stage, don't assume that the working container
will be useful for COPY instructions in subsequent stages that reference
the image that we're building FROM.

When locating previously-completed stages referenced in COPY
instructions in later stages, be consistent about requiring that those
stages need to have been completed before we can accept them as
alternate contexts for the sources being copied.

Signed-off-by: Nalin Dahyabhai <nalin@redhat.com>

comments.body: @rhatdan, I've tried rerunning the tests, no joy, can I ask you to give it a whirl?
I couldn't get the tests to restart, they were suffering from what looked like an Ubuntu network issue, so I took out the big hammer and repushed.  Fingers crossed.
Per @nalind's suggestion, I've added #2306 to this PR to try and get around the test issues.

@nalind, Ubuntu is not happy still, any thoughts on what's what?
```
+0000s] Retrying 5 times with a 30s delay, and 24s timeout for command: apt-get -qq --yes update
[+0155s] ##### (attempt #1)
[+0155s] E: The repository 'http://us-central1.gce.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu disco Release' no longer has a Release file.
[+0155s] E: The repository 'http://us-central1.gce.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu disco-updates Release' no longer has a Release file.
[+0155s] E: The repository 'http://us-central1.gce.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu disco-backports Release' does not have a Release file.
[+0155s] E: The repository 'http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu disco-security Release' no longer has a Release file.
```

disco isn't a long-term support release.  I'd be tempted to check if updating the images named in `.cirrus.yml` to match the values we use on the master branch would be enough, but I think we need @cevich's to help detangle this.
Well I am just going to merge.
